text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion isn't feeling well, so I take her to the
infirmary to get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Nnngh, sorry. I'm just going to have a little nap...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...?
What is this place?

text_block_list.name: Demon King
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh-heh... So you've awoken, Princess...
It is I, the Demon King...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The Demon King? I see. And what can I do for
you?

text_block_list.name: Demon King
text_block_list.text:
You are here as my hostage, to ensure that the
Umamusume-Trainer Alliance doesn't try anything
foolish. Now, sit tight in your front row seat and
watch as the world is annihilated!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
If you truly are "king," then I ask that you take a
good look around you.

text_block_list.name: Demon Child
text_block_list.text:
Mommy, the crops aren't growing at all. What's
wrong with them?

text_block_list.name: Demon Mother
text_block_list.text:
It's because this land is barren... Nothing will ever
grow here.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You wage war with other nations while you leave
the people of your own kingdom to suffer. And
what's more, you speak of annihilation and the
like...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
How could you turn a blind eye to the struggles
of your nation's people?!

text_block_list.name: Demon King
text_block_list.text: Ngh, grk?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
However... If you are willing to change your ways,
I shall share with you a few pieces of knowledge
I've picked up.

text_block_list.name: Demon King
text_block_list.text: Knowledge? Wh-what kind of knowledge?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I speak of the rice-cultivating methods of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Demon King
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Ohhh?!
Look at all that green... It's dazzling!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
After you've cooked the rice, you can fry it if you
like. Or boil it. It's a different kind of dish
altogether, but mochi is delicious as well.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
If you take care of the crops until autumn, you'll
end up with a field of priceless golden treasure!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...I'm suddenly feeling quite peckish. Off to have
a proper meal! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After getting some good rest, Fine Motion is back
to her usual self!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'll teach you all about Japanese ramen!

text_block_list.name: Demon King
text_block_list.text: Ra...men?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you've never heard of it? Allow me to tell you
all about it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The main ingredient of ramen noodles is wheat
flour, but then something called lye water is
mixed into it, and then...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Whoops, I droned on for a bit there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After speaking for so long and with such passion
in her dream, Fine Motion wakes up feeling as if
she barely got any rest.
